omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We may also share certain information such as cookie data with third-party advertising partners. This information would allow third-party ad networks to, among other things, deliver targeted advertisements that they believe will be of most interest to you.

With other Likee Users.
We may share some of your personal information on the public page of your account,
which may be accessible by other users, such as your username, name, gender, age and
self-introduction. You can adjust your privacy settings to hide this information from other
users.

We may also share certain information such as cookie data with third-party advertising partners. This
information would allow third-party ad networks to, among other things, deliver targeted advertisements
that they believe will be of most interest to you.

With other Likee Users.
We may share some of your personal information on the public page of your account,
which may be accessible by other users, such as your username, name, gender, age and
self-introduction. You can adjust your privacy settings to hide this information from other
users.

We may share with our business partners so that we can improve the Likee Services, such
as inter-platform linking, uploading and managing UGC, online purchases of Paid Services,
processing payment, user experience activities, and user services.
